knowledge_atoms.text:
English Party
WHEN: April 12th, 7 p.m.
WHERE: Gym
WHAT: You will play games. You will read riddles. You will act out stories. You will meet Robin the Robot. He is a great English teacher!
RSVP: Will you come to the party? Please send an email by March 23rd.
Great! When is the trip this year?
I like autumn, too. We usually have a school trip in autumn.
I like autumn. I really like the colours.
I'll cook for my mother. What about you?
Is the singing contest in May, too?
It's important to focus on immediate tasks before long-term plans.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 在考虑长期计划之前，专注于眼前的任务很重要。

knowledge_atoms.text: It's in April. We have a school trip, too.
It's in October. We'll go to the Great Wall.
It's usually in June. My mum will make zongzi then. I hope you can come and share some with us.
It's usually in September or October. I'll eat mooncakes with my family.
Learn the consonant digraph 'ch' /tʃ/ as in 'China'.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习辅音字母组合 'ch' /tʃ/ 的发音，如 'China'。

knowledge_atoms.text: Learn the consonant digraph 'sh' /ʃ/ as in 'sheep'.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习辅音字母组合 'sh' /ʃ/ 的发音，如 'sheep'。

knowledge_atoms.text: Listen again and answer the questions.
Look at my summer vacation plan!
Use 'at' for specific times (e.g., at 7 o'clock).
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 用'at'表示具体时刻（例如：at 7 o'clock）。

knowledge_atoms.text: Use 'on' for days of the week (e.g., on Tuesdays).
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 用'on'表示星期几（例如：on Tuesdays）。

knowledge_atoms.text: Using 'will' to talk about future plans.
We have a few fun things in spring. After the sports meet, we have an English party.
We'll go to the Great Wall.
What will Oliver have? Listen and tick.
What will you do if you have a birthday party? Write three sentences.
When is the school trip this year?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 今年的学校旅行是什么时候？

knowledge_atoms.text: When is the trip this year?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 今年的旅行是什么时候？

knowledge_atoms.text: Who will go to the sports meet next week? Listen and tick.
You have a great plan, but what will you do this weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: My school calendar. 单元首页图。两个学生正在看一个校历展板，上面列出了一月到六月的月份和相关的节日活动。他们讨论了植树节和端午节的时间，引出本单元关于月份、节日和日期的主题。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word summer vacation?
Can you say: When is the summer vacation?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: My school calendar. 两个女孩在讨论学校的活动安排，她们询问了学校旅行和歌唱比赛的时间。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word school trip?
Can you say: When is the school trip this year?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: School Events Calendar. 迈克和张鹏在讨论春季的学校活动，包括运动会、英语派对和学校旅行，并询问了这些活动的具体月份。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word sports meet?
Can you say: When is the party?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Months and Festivals. 通过一个日历图示，展示了一月到六月的月份名称、缩写以及每个月份对应的节日和活动。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word January (Jan.)?
Can you say: When is Tree Planting Day?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Phonics: ch / sh. 听录音，并按照听到的顺序为词组编号。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen, number and say.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Future Plans and Events. 奥利弗和陈洁在讨论他们对秋天的喜爱以及学校在秋季的活动安排，特别是去长城的学校旅行。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word autumn?
Can you say: When is the trip this year?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Months and Festivals. 通过一个日历图示，展示了七月到十二月的月份名称、缩写以及每个月份对应的节日和活动。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word July (Jul.)?
Can you say: When is Mid-Autumn Festival?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Party Invitation and Future Plans. 一封关于英语派对的邀请函，详细说明了派对的时间、地点、活动内容，并要求受邀者通过电子邮件回复。
entry_probe_questions:
Can you say: English Party
WHEN: April 12th, 7 p.m.
WHERE: Gym
WHAT: You will play games. You will read riddles. You will act out stories. You will meet Robin the Robot. He is a great English teacher!
RSVP: Will you come to the party? Please send an email by March 23rd.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Unit 3 Check & Wrap-up. 听录音，根据对话内容圈出表格中每个活动的正确月份。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and circle.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. 一个连环画故事。小熊祖姆正在制定暑假计划，包括七月去新疆看望祖父母，八月去黄山。小松鼠兹普提醒他，在考虑遥远的暑假之前，他需要先为下周一的数学考试做准备。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word summer vacation plan?
Can you say: It's important to focus on immediate tasks before long-term plans.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice true false activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据日历信息，判断关于节日和活动时间的五个陈述句是否正确。如果错误，需要改正月份。 Key patterns: When is Mother's Day?; It's in ...
allowed_answer_scope: 这题错误画叉 January and February
这题错误画叉 答案是：June

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the writing prompt activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一项写作任务，要求学生写三句话，描述如果自己举办生日派对将会做些什么。旁边提供了一个活动词库供参考。 Key patterns: What will you do if you have a birthday party? Write three sentences.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 总结和巩固时间介词'in', 'at', 'on'的用法。学生需要根据句子内容选择正确的介词填空。 Key patterns: Use 'in' for months (e.g., in March).; Use 'at' for specific times (e.g., at 7 o'clock).
core_patterns: Use 'at' for specific times (e.g., at 7 o'clock).
Use 'on' for days of the week (e.g., on Tuesdays).

return_anchors: Use 'at' for specific times (e.g., at 7 o'clock).
Use 'on' for days of the week (e.g., on Tuesdays).

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个连环画故事。小熊祖姆正在制定暑假计划，包括七月去新疆看望祖父母，八月去黄山。小松鼠兹普提醒他，在考虑遥远的暑假之前，他需要先为下周一的数学考试做准备。 Key patterns: It's important to focus on immediate tasks before long-term plans.; Using 'will' to talk about future plans.
core_patterns: It's important to focus on immediate tasks before long-term plans.
Using 'will' to talk about future plans.
You have a great plan, but what will you do this weekend?
Look at my summer vacation plan!
allowed_answer_scope: Look at my summer vacation plan!
It's April now. The summer vacation is still three months away.
In July I'll visit my grandparents. They live in Xinjiang.
We'll go to Grape Valley. The grapes there are very sweet! Grapes are my favourite fruit!
In August, I'll go to Huangshan Mountain. The trees there are very famous. The clouds are beautiful!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word summer vacation plan?
Can you say: It's important to focus on immediate tasks before long-term plans.
return_anchors: It's important to focus on immediate tasks before long-term plans.
Using 'will' to talk about future plans.
